channel.title: Senior Backend Architect Portfolio on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Senior Backend Architect Portfolio on Home

item.title: Senior Backend Architect / Principal Engineer
item.description: Professional dossier of a 20-year veteran active coder specializing in high-performance infrastructure and cryptographic security.

item.title: Energy Cloud Governance: Scaling to 10 Billion Records
item.description: Architecting a high-performance power big data platform on Alibaba Cloud, handling 10B+ records with optimized Elasticsearch clusters and network-level protocol tuning.

item.title: Hand-rolling SM9 (IBC) Cryptography for 8KB RAM Environments
item.description: A technical deep dive into the 2013-2014 implementation of Identity-Based Cryptography (SM9) on resource-constrained microcontrollers, achieving bank-grade security under 10KB of peak memory.

item.title: VC6 Linker Surgery: Cross-Temporal ABI Compatibility
item.description: Resolving 'LNK2005' and symbol collisions between legacy Visual C++ 6.0 (VC6) environments and modern build systems via symbol hijacking and static linking hacks.

item.title: Technical Whitepaper: Deterministic Computing
item.description: Deterministic Runtime Design under System Optimization and Extreme Constraints.

item.title: USB HID Protocols: Solving the 'Sacrificial Byte' & F&R Challenges
item.description: Designing a custom fragmentation protocol for USB HID and debugging low-level Windows driver quirks that 'swallowed' critical data bytes.

item.title: Technical Audit: Toyoko INN Performance & Security
item.description: External performance auditing of a massive reservation system (143.9B JPY scale), identifying 800M JPY in potential salvageable revenue through architectural optimization.

item.title: Deep Dive: Architectural Failures in a Fractionated RWA Protocol
item.description: A post-mortem of a P0 architectural audit in Tokyo, revealing how amateur engineering practices can lead to protocol-level insolvency in fractionated Real-World Asset protocols.

item.title: Web3 Indexer: Go Engine Architecture
item.description: Re-engineering a high-availability EVM blockchain indexer from TypeScript to Go, achieving 10x throughput and 99.9% data durability.

item.title: Physical Entropy: Utilizing CPU Jitter to Defeat Deterministic Attacks
item.description: Harvesting micro-physical entropy from the bare metal using RDTSC and RDRAND to defend against collision attacks in high-value private key generation.

item.title: ETL Performance Optimization: 70s to 1.5s
item.description: Re-architecting a Spring Boot ETL pipeline to achieve 50x throughput gain using high-performance Batch Upserts and Strategy Patterns.

item.title: Air-Gapped Hardening: Surgical Linux Kernel Customization
item.description: Reducing the attack surface and boot latency of air-gapped systems by stripping the Linux kernel down to its minimal functional primitives.

item.title: Legacy Hardening: Rescuing Industrial Infrastructure with 3DES/AES
item.description: Strategically upgrading a decade-old legacy infrastructure by wrapping insecure protocols in modern cryptographic layers, preventing a multi-million dollar hardware recall.

item.title: Technical Debt Governance: Dismantling the 'Microservice Tax'
item.description: Resolving 100+ P0 bugs, scaling ETL performance 50x, and restructuring a fragmented microservice architecture into a production-ready infrastructure.

item.title: Kernel Surgery: Stripping Linux 3.6.1 to 3.0MB
item.description: A deep-dive into building a hyper-secure, 3.0MB Linux kernel in a strictly air-gapped environment for cryptographic appliances.
